---
name: "✍️ Improve Educational Content"
about: "Suggest updates to parent guides, off-screen activities, or translation tables"
title: "content: improve [Concept Name/Document Name]"
labels: ["content", "documentation"]
assignees: []
---

### Target Area
* **Concept ID / Doc Path**: E.g. `concepts/00-number-sense/001-counting-0-to-10/parent-guide.md` or `docs/philosophy.md`
* **Language (if translation)**: E.g. English, Spanish, Hindi

### Proposed Refinements
[Describe what content is unclear, missing, or needs correction. Provide exact copy suggestions if possible.]

### Rationale
[Why will this change help parents or children understand this mathematical concept better?]
